  win_status

  "snow.ai.observability.agent.tool.cortex_analyst.sql_query": "WITH __sales_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    deal_id,
    sales_rep,
    win_status,
    close_date,
    deal_value
  FROM sales_intelligence.data.sales_metrics
)
SELECT
  win_status,
  COUNT(deal_id) AS num_deals,
  MIN(close_date) AS earliest_close_date,
  MAX(close_date) AS latest_close_date,
  COUNT(close_date) AS num_dates,
  SUM(deal_value) AS total_deal_value
FROM __sales_metrics
WHERE
  sales_rep = 'Sarah Johnson' AND close_date <= CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY
  win_status
ORDER BY
  win_status DESC NULLS LAST
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 5185f2db-84cb-4b75-b248-a24650109bb3)

  "snow.ai.observability.agent.tool.sql_execution.query": "WITH __sales_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    deal_id,
    sales_rep,
    win_status,
    close_date,
    deal_value
  FROM sales_intelligence.data.sales_metrics
)

  win_status,
  COUNT(deal_id) AS num_deals,
  MIN(close_date) AS min_close_date,
  MAX(close_date) AS max_close_date,
  SUM(deal_value) AS total_deal_value

WHERE
  sales_rep = 'Sarah Johnson' AND close_date <= CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY
  win_status
ORDER BY
  win_status DESC NULLS LAST

  "snow.ai.observability.agent.tool.cortex_analyst.sql_query": "WITH __sales_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    deal_id,
    sales_rep,
    win_status,
    close_date,
    deal_value
  FROM sales_intelligence.data.sales_metrics
)
SELECT
  win_status,
  COUNT(deal_id) AS num_deals,
  MIN(close_date) AS min_close_date,
  MAX(close_date) AS max_close_date,
  SUM(deal_value) AS total_deal_value
FROM __sales_metrics
WHERE
  sales_rep = 'Sarah Johnson' AND close_date <= CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY
  win_status
ORDER BY
  win_status DESC NULLS LAST

  "snow.ai.observability.agent.tool.cortex_analyst.sql_query": "WITH __sales_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    deal_id,
    sales_rep,
    win_status,
    close_date,
    deal_value
  FROM sales_intelligence.data.sales_metrics
)
SELECT
  win_status,
  COUNT(deal_id) AS num_deals,
  MIN(close_date) AS min_close_date,
  MAX(close_date) AS max_close_date,
  SUM(deal_value) AS total_deal_value
FROM __sales_metrics
WHERE
  sales_rep = 'Sarah Johnson' AND close_date <= CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY
  win_status
ORDER BY
  win_status DESC NULLS LAST

  "snow.ai.observability.agent.tool.cortex_analyst.messages": "["{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"How many deals did Sarah Johnson win compared to deals she lost?\"}]}"]",
  "snow.ai.observability.agent.tool.cortex_analyst.question_category": "UNAMBIGUOUS_SQL",
  "snow.ai.observability.agent.tool.cortex_analyst.request_id": "8d8cdf9b-056a-4a7d-a647-e8f724209216",
  "snow.ai.observability.agent.tool.cortex_analyst.semantic_model": "@SALES_INTELLIGENCE.DATA.MODELS/sales_metrics_model(1).yaml",
  "snow.ai.observability.agent.tool.cortex_analyst.sql_query": "WITH __sales_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    deal_id,
    sales_rep,
    win_status,
    close_date,
    deal_value
  FROM sales_intelligence.data.sales_metrics
)
SELECT
  win_status,
  COUNT(deal_id) AS num_deals,
  MIN(close_date) AS min_close_date,
  MAX(close_date) AS max_close_date,
  SUM(deal_value) AS total_deal_value
FROM __sales_metrics
WHERE
  sales_rep = 'Sarah Johnson' AND close_date <= CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY
  win_status
ORDER BY
  win_status DESC NULLS LAST
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: 8d8cdf9b-056a-4a7d-a647-e8f724209216)
;",

  "snow.ai.observability.agent.tool.cortex_analyst.sql_query": "WITH __sales_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    deal_id,
    sales_rep,
    win_status,
    close_date,
    deal_value
  FROM sales_intelligence.data.sales_metrics
)
SELECT
  win_status,
  COUNT(deal_id) AS num_deals,
  MIN(close_date) AS min_close_date,
  MAX(close_date) AS max_close_date,
  SUM(deal_value) AS total_deal_value
FROM __sales_metrics
WHERE
  sales_rep = 'Sarah Johnson' AND close_date <= CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY
  win_status
ORDER BY
  win_status DESC NULLS LAST
 -- Generated by Cortex Analyst (request_id: ddde5725-c340-4ec1-8f45-0d88086541b3)
;",

  "snow.ai.observability.agent.tool.cortex_analyst.sql_query": "WITH __sales_metrics AS (

    close_date,
    deal_value

)

  COUNT(deal_id) AS num_deals,
  MIN(close_date) AS min_close_date,
  MAX(close_date) AS max_close_date,
  SUM(deal_value) AS total_deal_value

  win_status
ORDER BY
  win_status DESC NULLS LAST

  "snow.ai.observability.agent.tool.cortex_analyst.sql_query": "WITH __sales_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    deal_id,
    sales_rep,
    win_status,
    close_date,
    deal_value
  FROM sales_intelligence.data.sales_metrics
)
SELECT
  win_status,
  COUNT(deal_id) AS num_deals,
  MIN(close_date) AS min_close_date,
  MAX(close_date) AS max_close_date,
  COUNT(close_date) AS num_dates,
  AVG(deal_value) AS avg_deal_value
FROM __sales_metrics
WHERE
  sales_rep = 'Sarah Johnson' AND close_date <= CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY
  win_status
ORDER BY
  win_status DESC NULLS LAST
